Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 The existential quantifier

 In this file, we construct the conjunction in the category of partial setoids. Here we
 use the characterization of subobjects in terms of formulas as given in the file
 `SubobjectDispCat.v`.

 The construction of the connectives of subobjects of partial setoids is similar to how
 connectives are defined for subsets. For the existential quantifier, we reuse the existential
 quantifier of the first-order hyperdoctrine.

 Content
 1. The formula
 2. Introduction rule
 3. Elimination rule
 4. Stability under substitution
 5. Dependent sums

 ******************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERs.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERTerminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMonomorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERConstantObjects.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.Logic.SubobjectDispCat.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope hd.

Section Existential.
  Context (H : first_order_hyperdoctrine).

  
Trying to mask the absolute name "Existential.Existential"!
[masking-absolute-name,deprecated-since-8.8,deprecated,default]

    Context {A B : partial_setoid H}
            (φ : partial_setoid_morphism A B)
            (ψ : per_subobject A).

    (** * 1. The formula *)
    Definition per_subobject_exists_form
      : form B
      := let γ₂ := π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) in
         let γ₁ := π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)) in
         (∃h (φ [ ⟨ γ₁ , γ₂ ⟩ ] ∧ ψ [ γ₁ ])).

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_laws per_subobject_exists_form

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_laws per_subobject_exists_form

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_def_law per_subobject_exists_form
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_eq_law per_subobject_exists_form

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_def_law per_subobject_exists_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))]
⊢ per_subobject_exists_form [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))]
  ⇒ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))]
∧ per_subobject_exists_form [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_exists_form [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)), π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A))]))
[π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))])
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))]
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B)))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩]
∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))]
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B)))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩]
∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))]
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))) [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))
  ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))) [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))
  ]tm

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩]
∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A) A
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A) B
φ [⟨ a, b ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ b ~ b

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A) A
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A) B
φ [⟨ a, b ⟩] ⊢ b ~ b

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A)): tm ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A) A
b:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A))): tm ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h A) B
φ [⟨ a, b ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ a, b ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_eq_law per_subobject_exists_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))
  ⇒ per_subobject_exists_form
    [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
    ⇒ per_subobject_exists_form
      [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))
⊢ per_subobject_exists_form
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
  ⇒ per_subobject_exists_form
    [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))
⊢ per_subobject_exists_form
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
  ⇒ per_subobject_exists_form
    [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))
∧ per_subobject_exists_form
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
⊢ per_subobject_exists_form
  [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_exists_form
[π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))
⊢ per_subobject_exists_form
  [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)), π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A))]))
[π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)), π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A))]))
  [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))])

A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A

      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩]

  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]

((∃h (φ

       ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]

[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ]tm

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h A)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h A))))
       ⟩]
      ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h A))])

b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩]

               
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ ψ [a]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
ψ [a] ⊢ ψ [a]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject B

ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject B

ψ: per_subobject A

 exact per_subobject_exists_laws.
    Defined.

    (** * 2. Introduction rule *)
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_mor_law (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ per_subobject_exists)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
per_subobject_mor_law (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ per_subobject_exists)

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]
⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A)
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
  ⇒ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
    ⇒ (per_subobject_subst φ per_subobject_exists)
      [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]
∧ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A)
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
  ⇒ (per_subobject_subst φ per_subobject_exists)
    [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(id_partial_setoid_morphism A)
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
⊢ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
  ⇒ (per_subobject_subst φ per_subobject_exists)
    [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(id_partial_setoid_morphism A)
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
⊢ (per_subobject_subst φ per_subobject_exists)
  [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)), π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩]
       ∧ (∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)),
               π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) ⟩]
              ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A))]))
         [π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B))]))
  [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩]
∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)), π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)),
             π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) ⟩
             [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)))
                 [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩
                 ]tm)
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))
              ⟩ ]tm]
            ∧ ψ
              [(π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)))
               [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)))
                   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))
                      ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))
                    ⟩ ]tm)
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)) ⟩
               ]tm]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm ~
(π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm
∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)), π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)),
             π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) ⟩
             [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)))
                 [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩
                 ]tm)
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))
              ⟩ ]tm]
            ∧ ψ
              [(π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)))
               [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)))
                   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))
                      ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))
                    ⟩ ]tm)
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)) ⟩
               ]tm]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
      ∧ ∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)),
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩]
            ∧ ψ
              [π₂
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))] ⊢ ?x ~ ?x
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
 ∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ?x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
       ∧ ∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)),
              π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)))
              ⟩]
             ∧ ψ
               [π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
tm ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) A
 exact (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))

        exact (partial_setoid_refl_l (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))
 ∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
       ∧ ∃h (φ
             [⟨ π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)),
              π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)))
              ⟩]
             ∧ ψ
               [π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))])))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
((π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))]
 ∧ ψ
   [(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)),
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)
                       ×h A)) ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))
              ⟩ ]tm]
            ∧ ψ
              [(π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)))
               [⟨ ⟨ (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B))
                  ⟩
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)
                         ×h A)) ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)
                      ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
((π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm ~
 (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A)))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm
 ∧ ψ
   [(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)),
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))) ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)
                       ×h A)) ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))
              ⟩ ]tm]
            ∧ ψ
              [(π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)))
               [⟨ ⟨ (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B))
                  ⟩
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)
                         ×h A)) ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)
                      ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))
 ∧ ψ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩]
      ∧ ∃h (φ
            [⟨ π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)
                     ×h A)),
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)
                      ×h A))) ⟩]
            ∧ ψ
              [π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h B)
                     ×h A))]))

φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B

a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ a₁ ~ a₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
a₁ ~ a₂ ⊢ a₁ ~ a₂

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ b ~ b
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ b ~ b

             exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined φ a₁ b (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)),
       b [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))
       ]tm ⟩]
      ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)),
    b [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)) ]tm ⟩]
   ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B), ?t ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A

            exact a₁.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)),
    b [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A)) ]tm ⟩]
   ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) ×h A))])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B), a₁ ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ∧ ψ [a₁]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ ψ [a₁]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
(a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ a₁, b ⟩] ⊢ ψ [a₁]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
a₁ ~ a₂ ∧ ψ [a₁] ⊢ ψ [a₁]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B))): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) A
b:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B)): tm (((𝟙 ×h A) ×h A) ×h B) B
ψ [a₁] ⊢ ψ [a₁]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

    (** * 3. Elimination rule *)
    Context {χ : per_subobject B}
            (p : per_subobject_mor_law
                   (id_partial_setoid_morphism A)
                   ψ
                   (per_subobject_subst φ χ)).

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
per_subobject_mor_law (id_partial_setoid_morphism B)
  per_subobject_exists χ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
per_subobject_mor_law (id_partial_setoid_morphism B)
  per_subobject_exists χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]
⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism B)
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩]
  ⇒ per_subobject_exists
    [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
    ⇒ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h B))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]
∧ (id_partial_setoid_morphism B)
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ per_subobject_exists
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
  ⇒ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(id_partial_setoid_morphism B)
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ per_subobject_exists
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
  ⇒ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(id_partial_setoid_morphism B)
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩]
∧ per_subobject_exists
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
⊢ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(π₁ (tm_var (B ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h B)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩]
∧ per_subobject_exists_form
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
⊢ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(π₁ (tm_var (B ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h B)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩]
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)), π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A))]))
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))]
⊢ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(π₁ (tm_var (B ×h B)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h B)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩]
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)), π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [(π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)))
         [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(π₁ (tm_var (B ×h B)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩ ]tm ~
(π₂ (tm_var (B ×h B)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)) ⟩ ]tm
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)), π₁ (tm_var (B ×h A)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [(π₂ (tm_var (B ×h A)))
         [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))])
⊢ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))
⊢ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))]

     ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))])
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]

  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩]

  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]

((∃h (φ

 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]
 ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))])

  ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]
⊢ (χ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]

  [(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B)))

χ: per_subobject B

[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)) ]tm
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),

π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ~

b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ~

χ: per_subobject B

  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))]

ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ

b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ χ [b₂]

b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ χ [b₂]

ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ

b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
Δ ⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) [⟨ a, a ⟩]

Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
r₁: Δ ⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) [⟨ a, a ⟩]
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ χ [b₂]

b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B

ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
Δ
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (A ×h A)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A)))
  [⟨ a, a ⟩]

Δ

  (π₂ (tm_var (A ×h A))) [⟨ a, a ⟩ ]tm

  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ⊢ a ~ a

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
r₁: Δ ⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) [⟨ a, a ⟩]
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ χ [b₂]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
r₁: Δ ⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) [⟨ a, a ⟩]
r₂: Δ ⊢ ψ [a]
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ χ [b₂]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
r₁: Δ ⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) [⟨ a, a ⟩]
r₂: Δ ⊢ ψ [a]
r₃:= per_subobject_mor p r₁ r₂: Δ ⊢ (per_subobject_subst φ χ) [a]
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ χ [b₂]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
r₁: Δ ⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) [⟨ a, a ⟩]
r₂: Δ ⊢ ψ [a]
r₃:= per_subobject_mor p r₁ r₂: Δ
⊢ (make_per_subobject
     (∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)),
           π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩]
          ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B))]))
     (per_subobject_subst_laws φ χ)) [a]
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ χ [b₂]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
r₁: Δ ⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) [⟨ a, a ⟩]
r₂: Δ ⊢ ψ [a]
r₃:= per_subobject_mor p r₁ r₂: Δ
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)),
        π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩]
       ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B))])) [a]
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ χ [b₂]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
r₁: Δ ⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) [⟨ a, a ⟩]
r₂: Δ ⊢ ψ [a]
r₃: Δ
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)),
        π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩]
       ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B))])
      [⟨ a
         [π₁
            (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))
       ⟩])
b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ χ [b₂]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
Δ:= b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a]: form (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)
r₁: Δ ⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) [⟨ a, a ⟩]
r₂: Δ ⊢ ψ [a]
r₃: Δ
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)),
        π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩]
       ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B))])
      [⟨ a
         [π₁
            (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))
       ⟩])
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)), π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩]
   ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B))])
  [⟨ a [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ (χ [b₂]) [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) B
a:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)): tm (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) A
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)), π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩]
   ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B))])
  [⟨ a [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ (χ [b₂]) [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)), π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩]
   ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B))])
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
⊢ (χ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))))
 [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm]
   ∧ ψ
     [(π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)), π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩
   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ χ
    [(π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)))
     [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ χ
  [(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))))
   [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))))
 [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm ~
 (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))))
 [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)),
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm]
   ∧ ψ
     [(π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A ×h B)), π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)) ⟩
   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ χ
    [(π₂ (tm_var (A ×h B)))
     [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ χ
  [(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A))))
   [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ]tm]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
    π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))))
    ⟩]
   ∧ ψ
     [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
  ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]
⊢ χ
  [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
    π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))))
    ⟩]
   ∧ ψ
     [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
  ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]
⊢ χ
  [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
    π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))))
    ⟩]
   ∧ ψ
     [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
  ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]
⊢ χ
  [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))]

A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
    π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))))
    ⟩]
   ∧ ψ
     [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
  ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]
⊢ χ
  [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
    π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))))
    ⟩]
   ∧ ψ
     [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)) ⟩]
  ∧ χ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))]
⊢ χ
  [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ χ [b₂]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ ?x ~ b₂
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ χ [?x]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
 exact b₃.

φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ b₃ ~ b₁
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ φ [⟨ ?x, b₃ ⟩]

A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ φ [⟨ ?x, b₁ ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
 exact a.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩]

ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ

b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩]

χ: per_subobject B

  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩]

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a] ⊢ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩]

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ b₁ ~ b₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₁ ~ b₂ ⊢ b₁ ~ b₂

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
(b₁ ~ b₂ ∧ φ [⟨ a, b₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [a])
∧ φ [⟨ a, b₃ ⟩] ∧ χ [b₃] ⊢ χ [b₃]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism A B
ψ: per_subobject A
χ: per_subobject B
p: per_subobject_mor_law
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism A) ψ
  (per_subobject_subst φ χ)
b₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
b₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
a:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) A
b₃:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h B) ×h B) ×h A) ×h B) B
χ [b₃] ⊢ χ [b₃]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.
  End Existential.

  (** * 4. Stability under substitution *)
  Section ExistentialSubst.
    Context {A₁ A₂ A₃ A₄ : partial_setoid H}
            {s₁ : partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁}
            {s₂ : partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁}
            {s₃ : partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃}
            {s₄ : partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂}
            (p : partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁
                 =
                 partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂)
            (Hp : isPullback (C := category_of_partial_setoids H) p)
            (φ : per_subobject A₂).

    Let P : Pullback (C := category_of_partial_setoids H) s₁ s₂
      := make_Pullback _ Hp.

    Section PullbackArrow.
      Let Γ : ty H := (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂.
      Let a₃ : tm Γ A₃ := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))).
      Let a₃' : tm Γ A₃ := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))).
      Let a₁ : tm Γ A₁ := π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))).
      Let a₂ : tm Γ A₂ := π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)).
      Let Δ : form Γ := (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩]) ∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂].

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
Δ ⊢ a₂ ~ a₂

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃

Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])

Δ ⊢ a₂ ~ a₂

      Let f : partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
        := point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂ per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1.
      Let g : partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
        := point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃ per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2.

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var

a₃':= π₂

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₂))]
     ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₂)) ~
       a₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₂)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₁) ×h A₂))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₁) ×h A₂)) ⟩]
    ∧ s₁
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₁) ×h A₂))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₃))]
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₃)) ~
         a₃ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₃)) ]tm)
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₁) ×h A₃))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₁) ×h A₃)) ⟩]
      ∧ s₂
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₁) ×h A₃)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₁) ×h A₃))) ⟩])

     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((...) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂

             (π₁

     ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))])

    (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₂))]
 ∧ π₂
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₂)) ~

   [π₁

   ]tm)
[⟨ π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
            ×h A₂))),
 π₂
   (tm_var
      ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))

                       ((((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                        ×h A₂)))
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((...) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                        ×h A₃)) ]tm,
               π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ]tm])
        ∧ s₁
          [⟨ π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
           ⟩
           [(π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                   ×h A₃)))
            [⟨ π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                        ×h A₃))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((((((...) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                    ×h A₁) ×h A₃)) ⟩
             [⟨ (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                       ×h A₂)))
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                        ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((((((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                     ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ]tm]
          ∧ φ
            [(π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
             [(π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                     ×h A₃)))
              [⟨ π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                          ×h A₃))),
               π₂
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((...) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                      ×h A₁) ×h A₃)) ⟩
               [⟨ (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                         ×h A₂)))
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                          ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                       ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ]tm])
       ∧ (π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                ×h A₃)))
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                      ×h A₁) ×h A₃))),
          π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                 ×h A₁) ×h A₃)) ⟩
          [⟨ (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                     ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))

                (tm_var
                   (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                      ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ]tm,
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                   ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ~
         ((π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                          ×h A₂))))))
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                 ×h A₃)) ]tm)
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                      ×h A₁) ×h A₃))),
          π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)

                (tm_var
                   ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)

             [π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                      ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ]tm,
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)

      ∧ s₂
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                  ×h A₁) ×h A₃)),

                 ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)

               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                    ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
            [π₁
