            (tm_var
               (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                  ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ⟩ ]tm])

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
(((π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((...) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))
      ⟩])
  ∧ s₁
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((((...) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                    ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                    ×h A₂))))) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                    ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))])
 ∧ π₂
     (tm_var
        ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
         ×h A₂)) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))
∧ s₁
  [⟨ π₂
       (tm_var
          ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
           ×h A₂)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
            ×h A₂))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((((π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (... ×h A₃)))))))) ~
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((... ×h A₂) ×h A₃)))))))
         ∧ s₂
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((...) ×h A₂) ×h A₃))))))
            ⟩])
        ∧ s₁
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((... ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                            ×h A₃))))),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃))))))
           ⟩]
          ∧ φ
            [π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((((...) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                             ×h A₂) ×h A₃)))))])
       ∧ π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                 ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ~
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                                 ×h A₃)))))))))
      ∧ s₂
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                   ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                        ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃))))
         ⟩])

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
(((π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((...) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))
      ⟩])
  ∧ s₁
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((((...) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                    ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))),
     π₂

             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((...) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
                    ×h A₂))))) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                    ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))])
 ∧ π₂
     (tm_var
        ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
         ×h A₂)) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))
∧ s₁
  [⟨ π₂
       (tm_var
          ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
           ×h A₂)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁)
            ×h A₂))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((((π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁

              (π₁
                 (π₁

         ∧ s₂
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁

            π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((...) ×h A₂) ×h A₃))))))
            ⟩])
        ∧ s₁
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var

                 ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃)) ~

                          (π₁
                             (tm_var

                                 ×h A₃)))))))))

              (π₁

                    (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                        ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₃))))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
(((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))),
      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))) ⟩])
  ∧ s₁
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))) ⟩]
    ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))])
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var Γ') ~ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))
∧ s₁ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var Γ'), π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((((π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))) ~
         π₂
           (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))
         ∧ s₂
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))),
            π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
            ⟩])
        ∧ s₁
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))),
           π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
           ⟩]
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))])
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)) ~
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))))
      ∧ s₂
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))) ⟩])

(((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))
   ∧ s₂

            ⟩])

           π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
           ⟩]

         π₂

                 (π₁

      ∧ s₂

            ⟩])

          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))),
           π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
           ⟩]
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))])
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)) ~
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))))
      ∧ s₂
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))) ⟩])

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁
x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))),
      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))) ⟩])
  ∧ s₁
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))) ⟩]
    ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))])
 ∧ π₂ (tm_var Γ') ~ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))
∧ s₁ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var Γ'), π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((((π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))) ~
         π₂
           (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))
         ∧ s₂
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))),
            π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
            ⟩])
        ∧ s₁
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))),
           π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
           ⟩]
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))])
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)) ~
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))))
      ∧ s₂
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))) ⟩])

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var

a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((((π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))) ~
         π₂
           (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))
         ∧ s₂
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))),
            π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
            ⟩])
        ∧ s₁
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))),
           π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
           ⟩]
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))])
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)) ~
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))))
      ∧ s₂
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))) ⟩])

x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]
⊢ ((((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))) ~
      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))
      ∧ s₂
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ...))))))),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))) ⟩])
     ∧ s₁
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))),

    ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)) ~
      π₂

           (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)),
      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var Γ', ?t ⟩]

x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂

            exact x₁.

       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))) ⟩]
       ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))])
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)) ~
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)),
      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁
x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]
⊢ ((((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))) ~
      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩]
     ∧ s₂
       [⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))) ⟩
        [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm])
    ∧ s₁
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))) ⟩
       [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ φ
        [(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
         [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm])
   ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)) ~
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩])
  ∧ s₂
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))) ⟩
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁

s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃

a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁
x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]
⊢ ((((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm ~
     (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm
     ∧ s₂
       [⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))) ⟩
        [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm])
    ∧ s₁
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))) ⟩
       [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ φ
        [(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))))))
         [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm])
   ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃))) [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm ~
     (π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm)
  ∧ s₂
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₃)))) ⟩
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₁ ⟩ ]tm]

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁
x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]
⊢ (((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))
     ∧ s₂
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))) ⟩])
    ∧ s₁
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))) ⟩]
      ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))])
   ∧ x₁ ~ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))))
  ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')) ⟩]

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]
⊢ (((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
    ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₁ ~ x₁)
  ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₅ ⟩]

(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])

∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩]

  (π₁

a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism

g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃

(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩]

partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩] ⊢ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁

s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃

Hp: isPullback p

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁
x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩]

x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
tm Γ' A₃
 exact x₁.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩]

x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ ?x₁ ~ x₄

  (π₁

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ ?y₁ ~ x₅

(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ s₁ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₂
tm Γ' A₂
 exact x₆.

(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₄)
∧ s₁ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ x₅ ~ x₅

(((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))) ~

  (π₁

(((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))
   ∧ s₂

 ∧ π₂ (tm_var Γ') ~

      ∧ s₁

partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂

φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₃: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁
x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₃
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)
∧ s₂ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((((π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))))))) ~
         π₂
           (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))))))
         ∧ s₂
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))),
            π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))))
            ⟩])
        ∧ s₁
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))),
           π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))))
           ⟩]
          ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))))])
       ∧ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)) ~
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))))
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))) ⟩])

tm Γ' A₂

(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)

   ∧ s₁
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)),
      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var Γ', ?t ⟩]

φ: per_subobject A₂

  (π₁

a₃':= π₂
  (π₁

Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₃
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)
∧ s₂ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]

      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩]
     ∧ s₂
       [⟨ π₂

        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))))) ⟩
        [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm])
    ∧ s₁
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))))) ⟩
       [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ φ
        [(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))))
         [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm])
   ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)) ~
      π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))) ⟩
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm]

        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₃: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁
x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₃
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)
∧ s₂ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]
⊢ ((((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm ~
     (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm
     ∧ s₂
       [⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (...)))))))),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))))) ⟩
        [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm])
    ∧ s₁
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))))) ⟩
       [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ φ
        [(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))))
         [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm])
   ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))) [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm ~
     (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂))))))
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm)
  ∧ s₁
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₂)))) ⟩
     [⟨ tm_var Γ', x₄ ⟩ ]tm]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₃: ty H
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁
x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₃
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)
∧ s₂ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩]
⊢ (((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))
     ∧ s₂
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))),
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))) ⟩])
    ∧ s₁
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))) ⟩]
      ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))])
   ∧ x₄ ~ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')) ⟩]

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁

(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁
x₄:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₂
x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₃
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)
∧ s₂ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ s₁ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₃
tm Γ' A₂
 exact x₄.

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
Γ':= (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₁) ×h A₃: ty H

x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₁

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₃
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩]) ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]
⊢ x₄ ~ x₄

(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)
∧ s₂ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ x₃ ~ x₅

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))): tm Γ' A₃
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃

x₅:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₁
x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₃
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)
∧ s₂ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ ?x₁ ~ x₁

∧ s₂ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ ?y₁ ~ x₅

x₆:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₃
(((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩] ∧ φ [x₄]) ∧ x₆ ~ x₁)
∧ s₂ [⟨ x₆, x₅ ⟩] ⊢ s₂ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

tm Γ' A₃
 exact x₆.

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃

((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ s₂ [⟨ x₁, x₃ ⟩])

a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃

⊢ s₁ [⟨ x₄, x₃ ⟩]

              apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      Qed.

      Local Definition per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun
        : partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
        := PullbackArrow P _ _ _ per_subobject_exists_subst_fun_eq.

      Let h : partial_setoid_morphism (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
        := per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun.
      Let Γ' : ty H := Γ ×h A₄.
      Let γ : tm Γ' Γ := π₁ (tm_var Γ').
      Let b₃ : tm Γ' A₃ := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))).
      Let b₃' : tm Γ' A₃ := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))).
      Let b₁ : tm Γ' A₁ := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))).
      Let b₂ : tm Γ' A₂ := π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')).
      Let b₄ : tm Γ' A₄ := π₂ (tm_var Γ').

      Context (Δ' : form Γ').

q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]

A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]

A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
Δ' ⊢ b₂ ~ π₂ γ

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
((π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
  ∧ s₂
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
     π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
     ⟩])
 ∧ s₁
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
    ⟩]
   ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))])
[π₁ (tm_var Γ')] ⊢ b₂ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
((π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))
 [π₁ (tm_var Γ')]
 ∧ s₂
   [⟨ π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
    ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm])
∧ s₁
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
   ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm]
  ∧ φ
    [(π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
     [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm] ⊢ b₂ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))

     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
((π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))))
 [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm ~
 (π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))
 [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm
 ∧ s₂
   [⟨ π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
    ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm])
∧ s₁
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
   ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm]
  ∧ φ
    [(π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
     [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm] ⊢ b₂ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))
 ∧ s₂
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))),
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))) ⟩])
∧ s₁
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')), π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))) ⟩]
  ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))] ⊢ b₂ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))

∧ s₁ [⟨ b₂, b₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [b₂] ⊢ b₂ ~ b₂

Δ' ⊢ s₄ [⟨ b₄, b₂ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
tm (Γ' ×h A₄) A₄

A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁

  (π₁

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
tm (Γ' ×h A₄) A₂
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
Δ' [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
  ∧ s₄
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
     b₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ ?x₁ ~ b₄ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm

g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃

γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ

b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃

q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
tm (Γ' ×h A₄) A₄
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).

  (π₁

a₃':= π₂
  (π₁

a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
tm (Γ' ×h A₄) A₂
 exact (b₂ [ π₁ (tm_var _) ]tm).

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
Δ' [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
  ∧ s₄
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
     b₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ~
  b₄ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
h
[⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
⊢ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
Δ' [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
  ∧ s₄
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
     b₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   b₄ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]

q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]

⊢ h

a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁

  (π₁
     (π₁

a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism

g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃

γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ

q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
(h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
⊢ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   b₄ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]

a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism

h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃

b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂

q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
Δ' [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
  ∧ s₄
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
     b₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]

  b₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm

q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
s₄
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
 b₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ s₄
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
   b₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₄ = f
r': Δ' ⊢ f [⟨ γ, b₂ ⟩]
Δ' [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
  ∧ s₄
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
     b₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ s₄
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
   b₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂

q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₃ = g

       (π₁

             (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))) ~

         (π₁

   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),

    ⟩]
   ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))])
[π₁ (tm_var Γ')]
⊢ b₃ ~ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))

((π₂

       (π₁

    (π₁
       (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))

 ∧ s₂
   [⟨ π₂
        (π₁

   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₃ = g
((π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))))
 [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm ~
 (π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))
 [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm
 ∧ s₂
   [⟨ π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
    ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm])
∧ s₁
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
   ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm]
  ∧ φ
    [(π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
     [π₁ (tm_var Γ') ]tm]
⊢ b₃ ~ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))))

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H

partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁

a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁

a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃

b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃

b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄

q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₃ = g
(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))
 ∧ s₂
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))),
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))) ⟩])

  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,

b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₃ = g
r': Δ' ⊢ g [⟨ γ, b₃ ⟩]
Δ' [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
  ∧ s₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
     b₃ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ~
  b₄ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂

b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂

q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]

r': Δ' ⊢ g [⟨ γ, b₃ ⟩]
tm (Γ' ×h A₄) (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ)

q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₃ = g
r': Δ' ⊢ g [⟨ γ, b₃ ⟩]
h
[⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
⊢ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₃ = g
r': Δ' ⊢ g [⟨ γ, b₃ ⟩]
Δ' [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
  ∧ s₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
     b₃ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   b₄ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ

  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism

g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism

h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄

γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃

q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₃ = g
r': Δ' ⊢ g [⟨ γ, b₃ ⟩]
Δ' [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
  ∧ s₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
     b₃ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]

  b₃ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₃ = g
r': Δ' ⊢ g [⟨ γ, b₃ ⟩]
Δ' [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ γ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ⟩]
  ∧ s₃
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
     b₃ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ s₃
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
   b₃ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)): tm Γ A₂
Δ:= (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]: form Γ
f:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₂
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_1: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₂
g:= point_partial_setoid_morphism H Δ a₃
  per_subobject_exists_subst_def_lem_2: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₃
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H Δ) A₄
Γ':= Γ ×h A₄: ty H
γ:= π₁ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' Γ
b₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))))): tm Γ' A₃
b₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')))): tm Γ' A₃
b₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ'))): tm Γ' A₁
b₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ')): tm Γ' A₂
b₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ'): tm Γ' A₄
Δ': form Γ'
q: Δ' ⊢ h [⟨ γ, b₄ ⟩]
q': Δ' ⊢ Δ [γ]
r: partial_setoid_comp_morphism h s₃ = g
r': Δ' ⊢ g [⟨ γ, b₃ ⟩]
s₃
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
 b₃ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]
⊢ s₃
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)),
   b₃ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ' ×h A₄)) ]tm ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      Qed.
    End PullbackArrow.

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
per_subobject_mor_law (id_partial_setoid_morphism A₃)
  (per_subobject_subst s₂ (per_subobject_exists s₁ φ))
  (per_subobject_exists s₃ (per_subobject_subst s₄ φ))

  (per_subobject_subst s₂ (per_subobject_exists s₁ φ))
  (per_subobject_exists s₃ (per_subobject_subst s₄ φ))

Hp: isPullback p

P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h A₃))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))]
⊢ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A₃)
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)) ⟩]
  ⇒ (per_subobject_subst s₂
       (per_subobject_exists s₁ φ))
    [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)))]
    ⇒ (per_subobject_exists s₃
         (per_subobject_subst s₄ φ))
      [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))]

∧ (id_partial_setoid_morphism A₃)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H

s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =

Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
(π₁ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₃)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₃)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)) ⟩]
∧ (∃h (s₂
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)),
        π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)) ⟩]
       ∧ (∃h (s₁
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A₁ ×h A₂)),
               π₁ (tm_var (A₁ ×h A₂)) ⟩]
              ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (A₁ ×h A₂))]))
         [π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁))]))
  [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)))]
⊢ (∃h (s₃
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₄)),
        π₁ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₄)) ⟩]
       ∧ (∃h (s₄
              [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A₄ ×h A₂)),
               π₂ (tm_var (A₄ ×h A₂)) ⟩]
              ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (A₄ ×h A₂))]))
         [π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₄))]))
  [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
(π₁ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₃)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₃)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)) ⟩]
∧ ∃h (s₂
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)),
       π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (s₁
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A₁ ×h A₂)),
             π₁ (tm_var (A₁ ×h A₂)) ⟩
             [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)))
                 [⟨ (π₂
                       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁))
                  ⟩ ]tm)
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))
              ⟩ ]tm]
            ∧ φ
              [(π₂ (tm_var (A₁ ×h A₂)))
               [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)))
                   [⟨ (π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))))
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁))
                      ]tm,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)) ⟩
                   ]tm)
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                         ×h A₂)) ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))
                ⟩ ]tm]))
⊢ ∃h (s₃
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₄)),
       π₁ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₄)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (s₄
            [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A₄ ×h A₂)),
             π₂ (tm_var (A₄ ×h A₂)) ⟩
             [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₄)))
                 [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄))
                  ⟩ ]tm)
                [π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄) ×h A₂))
                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄) ×h A₂))
              ⟩ ]tm]
            ∧ φ
              [(π₂ (tm_var (A₄ ×h A₂)))
               [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₄)))
                   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)))
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄))
                      ]tm,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄)) ⟩
                   ]tm)
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄)
                         ×h A₂)) ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₄) ×h A₂))
                ⟩ ]tm]))

Hp: isPullback p

P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
(π₁ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₃)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)) ⟩ ]tm ~
(π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₃)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)) ⟩ ]tm
∧ ∃h (s₂
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)),
       π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ∃h (s₁
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (A₁ ×h A₂)),
             π₁ (tm_var (A₁ ×h A₂)) ⟩
             [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)))
                 [⟨ (π₂
                       (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁))
                  ⟩ ]tm)
                [π₁

                ]tm,
              π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))
              ⟩ ]tm]
            ∧ φ
              [(π₂ (tm_var (A₁ ×h A₂)))
               [⟨ ((π₂ (tm_var (A₃ ×h A₁)))
                   [⟨ (π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃))))
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁))
                      ]tm,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)) ⟩
                   ]tm)
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var

                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))
 ∧ s₂
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))), π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))
    ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var Γ), π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var Γ)]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)) ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var Γ), π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var Γ)]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
