P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₃
(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))
 ∧ s₂
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))), π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))
    ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var Γ), π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var Γ)]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)) ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var Γ), π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var Γ)]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= (((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₂
(a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]
⊢ (a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
  ∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂

         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
((π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
  ∧ s₂
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
     π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
     ⟩])

    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
    ⟩]
   ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))]
∧ h
  [⟨ (tm_var
        (formula_to_partial_setoid H
           ((π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((... ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))) ~
             π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((... ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
             ∧ s₂
               [⟨ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((...) ×h A₂))))),
                π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((...) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
                ⟩])
            ∧ s₁
              [⟨ π₂
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
               π₂

                        ×h A₂))) ⟩]
              ∧ φ
                [π₂

     [π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))
     ]tm,
   π₂
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))
   ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (s₃
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                ×h A₄)),
        π₂

             (π₁

                      (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                        ×h A₂) ×h A₄))))) ⟩]
       ∧ ∃h (s₄
             [⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                           ×h A₂) ×h A₄) ×h A₂))),
              π₂

                     ×h A₄) ×h A₂)) ⟩]
             ∧ φ
               [π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                        ×h A₂) ×h A₄) ×h A₂))])))
  [π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))]

(((π₂

      [⟨ π₂
           (tm_var
              ((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                ×h A₄) ×h A₄)),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((((...) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                          ×h A₄) ×h A₄)))))) ⟩]
      ∧ ∃h (s₄
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                           ×h A₂) ×h A₄) ×h A₄) ×h A₂))),
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                     ×h A₄) ×h A₄) ×h A₂)) ⟩]
            ∧ φ
              [π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (((((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                        ×h A₂) ×h A₄) ×h A₄) ×h A₂))]))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
((π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))
  ∧ s₂
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))) ⟩])
 ∧ s₁
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)), π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))) ⟩]
   ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))])
∧ h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), π₂ (tm_var Γ) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (s₃
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₄)),
       π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₄)))))) ⟩]
      ∧ ∃h (s₄
            [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₄) ×h A₂))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₄) ×h A₂)) ⟩]
            ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h A₄) ×h A₂))]))

Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
((a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
 ∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂])
∧ h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), a₄ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (s₄
      [⟨ a₄ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₂)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₂)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₂))])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
((a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
 ∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂])
∧ h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), a₄ ⟩] ⊢ s₃ [⟨ a₄, a₃' ⟩]

                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
tm Γ A₃
 exact a₃.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
((a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
 ∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂])
∧ h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), a₄ ⟩] ⊢ a₄ ~ a₄

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂

a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), a₄ ⟩] ⊢ a₄ ~ a₄

            exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined h _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
((a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
 ∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂])
∧ h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), a₄ ⟩]
⊢ per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun
  [⟨ π₁
       (tm_var
          (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄)),
   π₂
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))
   ⟩]

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁

      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H

a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), a₄ ⟩]
⊢ per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun
  [⟨ π₁
       (tm_var
          (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄)),
   π₂
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))
   ⟩]

                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
(a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]
⊢ (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                     ×h A₄)))))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                  ×h A₄)))))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                           ×h A₂) ×h A₄)))))),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                  ×h A₄)))) ⟩])
  ∧ s₁
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                ×h A₄))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                 ×h A₄)))) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                ×h A₄)))]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
((a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
 ∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂])
∧ h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), a₄ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (s₄
      [⟨ a₄ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₂)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₂)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h A₂))])

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var

          ⟩])

        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var

         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H

a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃

a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂

((a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
 ∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂])
∧ h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), a₄ ⟩] ⊢ φ [a₂]

s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
(a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]
⊢ ((π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))) ~
    π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
    ∧ s₂
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                        ×h A₂))))),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
       ⟩])
   ∧ s₁
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
      π₂
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
      ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))])
  [π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))]

               
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
(a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]
⊢ ((π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))) ~
    π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))
   [π₁
      (tm_var
         (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))]
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
      π₂
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
      ⟩
      [π₁
         (tm_var
            (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))
      ]tm])
  ∧ s₁
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
     π₂
       (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
     ⟩
     [π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))
     ]tm]
    ∧ φ
      [(π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
       [π₁
          (tm_var
             (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))
       ]tm]

  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂

                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),

      ∧ s₁

         ⟩]
        ∧ φ

a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]
⊢ ((π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))))
   [π₁
      (tm_var
         (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))
   ]tm ~
   (π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))))
   [π₁
      (tm_var
         (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄))

   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂
          (π₁

A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H

s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂

                 (π₁

                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁

          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
(a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂]
⊢ (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                     ×h A₄)))))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                  ×h A₄)))))
   ∧ s₂
     [⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)

                 (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                  ×h A₄)))) ⟩])

    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                ×h A₄))),
     π₂

             (tm_var

      [π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)
                ×h A₄)))]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H
s₁: partial_setoid_morphism A₂ A₁
s₂: partial_setoid_morphism A₃ A₁
s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
((a₃ ~ a₃' ∧ s₂ [⟨ a₃, a₁ ⟩])
 ∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂])
∧ h [⟨ π₁ (tm_var Γ), a₄ ⟩] ⊢ φ [a₂]

∧ s₁ [⟨ a₂, a₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [a₂] ⊢ φ [a₂]

A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: partial_setoid H

s₃: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₃
s₄: partial_setoid_morphism A₄ A₂
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₄ s₁ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism s₃ s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: per_subobject A₂
P:= make_Pullback p Hp: Pullback s₁ s₂
h:= per_subobject_exists_subst_pb_fun: partial_setoid_morphism
  (formula_to_partial_setoid H
     ((π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁)
                      ×h A₂))))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))
       ∧ s₂
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃)
                            ×h A₁) ×h A₂))))),
          π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ s₁
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ φ
          [π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂))]))
  A₄
Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h A₃) ×h A₃) ×h A₁) ×h A₂) ×h A₄: ty H
a₃:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ A₃
a₃':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)))): tm Γ A₃
a₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))): tm Γ A₁
a₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var Γ)): tm Γ A₂
a₄:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ A₄
φ [a₂] ⊢ φ [a₂]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.
  End ExistentialSubst.

  (** * 5. Dependent sums *)
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
has_dependent_sums (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H)

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
has_dependent_sums (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
locally_propositional (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ Γ₁ Γ₂ : category_of_partial_setoids H,
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₁, Γ₂ ⟧
→ (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₁}]
  → (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₂}]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (Γ₁ Γ₂ : category_of_partial_setoids H)
(s : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₁, Γ₂ ⟧)
(φ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₁}]),
φ -->[
identity Γ₁] pr1
               (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H Γ₂
                  Γ₁ s (?ex Γ₁ Γ₂ s φ))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (Γ₁ Γ₂ : category_of_partial_setoids H)
(s : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₁, Γ₂ ⟧)
(ψ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₁}])
(χ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₂}]),
ψ -->[
identity Γ₁] pr1
               (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H Γ₂
                  Γ₁ s χ)
→ ?ex Γ₁ Γ₂ s ψ -->[ identity Γ₂] χ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (Γ₁ Γ₂ Γ₃ Γ₄ : category_of_partial_setoids H)
(s₁ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₂, Γ₁ ⟧)
(s₂ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₃, Γ₁ ⟧)
(s₃ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₄, Γ₃ ⟧)
(s₄ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₄, Γ₂ ⟧)
(p : s₄ · s₁ = s₃ · s₂),
isPullback p
→ ∏ φ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₂}],
  pr1
    (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H Γ₁ Γ₃ s₂
       (?ex Γ₂ Γ₁ s₁ φ)) -->[
  identity Γ₃] ?ex Γ₄ Γ₃ s₃
                 (pr1
                    (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H
                       Γ₂ Γ₄ s₄ φ))

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
locally_propositional (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
 apply locally_prop_disp_cat_per_subobject.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ Γ₁ Γ₂ : category_of_partial_setoids H,
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₁, Γ₂ ⟧
→ (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₁}]
  → (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₂}]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A, B ⟧
ψ: (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]
(disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{B}]

      exact (per_subobject_exists φ ψ).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (Γ₁ Γ₂ : category_of_partial_setoids H)
(s : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₁, Γ₂ ⟧)
(φ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₁}]),
φ -->[
identity Γ₁] pr1
               (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H Γ₂
                  Γ₁ s
                  ((λ (A
                       B : category_of_partial_setoids
                             H)
                    (φ0 : category_of_partial_setoids
                            H ⟦ A, B ⟧)
                    (ψ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]),
                    per_subobject_exists φ0 ψ) Γ₁ Γ₂ s
                     φ))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A, B ⟧
ψ: (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]
ψ -->[
identity A] pr1
              (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H B A φ
                 ((λ (A
                      B : category_of_partial_setoids
                            H)
                   (φ : category_of_partial_setoids H
                        ⟦ A, B ⟧)
                   (ψ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]),
                   per_subobject_exists φ ψ) A B φ ψ))

      exact (per_subobject_exists_intro φ ψ).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (Γ₁ Γ₂ : category_of_partial_setoids H)
(s : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₁, Γ₂ ⟧)
(ψ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₁}])
(χ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₂}]),
ψ -->[
identity Γ₁] pr1
               (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H Γ₂
                  Γ₁ s χ)
→ (λ (A B : category_of_partial_setoids H)
   (φ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A, B ⟧)
   (ψ0 : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]),
   per_subobject_exists φ ψ0) Γ₁ Γ₂ s ψ -->[
  identity Γ₂] χ
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A, B: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A, B ⟧
ψ: (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]
χ: (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{B}]
p: ψ -->[
identity A] pr1
              (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H B
                 A φ χ)
(λ (A B : category_of_partial_setoids H)
 (φ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A, B ⟧)
 (ψ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]),
 per_subobject_exists φ ψ) A B φ ψ -->[ identity B] χ

      exact (per_subobject_exists_elim φ ψ p).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ (Γ₁ Γ₂ Γ₃ Γ₄ : category_of_partial_setoids H)
(s₁ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₂, Γ₁ ⟧)
(s₂ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₃, Γ₁ ⟧)
(s₃ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₄, Γ₃ ⟧)
(s₄ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Γ₄, Γ₂ ⟧)
(p : s₄ · s₁ = s₃ · s₂),
isPullback p
→ ∏ φ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{Γ₂}],
  pr1
    (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H Γ₁ Γ₃ s₂
       ((λ (A B : category_of_partial_setoids H)
         (φ0 : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A, B ⟧)
         (ψ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]),
         per_subobject_exists φ0 ψ) Γ₂ Γ₁ s₁ φ)) -->[
  identity Γ₃] (λ (A
                   B : category_of_partial_setoids H)
                (φ0 : category_of_partial_setoids H
                      ⟦ A, B ⟧)
                (ψ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]),
                per_subobject_exists φ0 ψ) Γ₄ Γ₃ s₃
                 (pr1
                    (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H
                       Γ₂ Γ₄ s₄ φ))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
A₁, A₂, A₃, A₄: category_of_partial_setoids H
s₁: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A₂, A₁ ⟧
s₂: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A₃, A₁ ⟧
s₃: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A₄, A₃ ⟧
s₄: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A₄, A₂ ⟧
p: s₄ · s₁ = s₃ · s₂
Hp: isPullback p
φ: (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A₂}]
pr1
  (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H A₁ A₃ s₂
     ((λ (A B : category_of_partial_setoids H)
       (φ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A, B ⟧)
       (ψ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]),
       per_subobject_exists φ ψ) A₂ A₁ s₁ φ)) -->[
identity A₃] (λ (A B : category_of_partial_setoids H)
              (φ : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ A,
                   B ⟧)
              (ψ : (disp_cat_per_subobject H)[{A}]),
              per_subobject_exists φ ψ) A₄ A₃ s₃
               (pr1
                  (disp_cat_per_subobject_cleaving H
                     A₂ A₄ s₄ φ))

      exact (per_subobject_exists_subst p Hp φ).
  Defined.
End Existential.
